reasoning: Today's workout focuses on improving lactate clearance, targeting your specific limiter. The 25W drop from your 5-min to 20-min power indicates poor aerobic endurance and fatigue resistance. By incorporating over-unders originally aimed for the Alpine Loop climb, you'll boost your ability to maintain power over longer durations, building a stronger aerobic base needed for Emigration Canyon practices and the key Cascade Springs segment of the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x8 min over-unders: alternate 2 min at 209W (88% FTP) then 6 min at 250W (105% FTP), 3 min easy between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
